clusters.justification: Captures the broad functional axis coordinated by limbic and anterior insulo-cingulate cortices to process physiological arousal, valence, and systemic responses to internal or external stimuli.
Represents the macroscopic striatal and ventromedial prefrontal computations underlying incentive-based learning, reward processing, and cost-benefit decision-making.

Reflects the internally directed, abstract representational capacities of the cortical midline and temporoparietal cortices, linking self-referential processing with the inference of others' mental states.
